scenario: You need to write a plugin to consume the custom API shown in the exhibit. The Custom API has been defined as a function (Is Function = Yes) with at least one response property.
q: Which HTTP method should you use to call this custom API?
why: Use GET. This Custom API is defined as a FUNCTION (Is Function = Yes), and functions are called with the GET method - GET calls retrieve information, so functions must return data via at least one response property. If the Custom API were defined as an ACTION (Is Function = No) it would be called with POST. PUT/PATCH are used to update/replace resources, not to call a Custom API function.
